description: a constant-false predicate (WHERE 1=0) folds to an empty ValueScan; a no-GROUP-BY COUNT still yields {n:0}
statements: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE 1=0

description: constant-false with SUM/COUNT: SUM over empty is null, COUNT is 0
statements: SELECT SUM(1) AS s, COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE 1=0

description: constant-false, non-aggregate projection yields zero rows
statements: SELECT c.name FROM default:contacts c WHERE 1=0
